Package in.co.rays.proj4.model

Class CollegeModel

java.lang.Object
in.co.rays.proj4.model.CollegeModel
public class CollegeModel extends Object
CollegeModel is a Model class that handles database operations for the College entity. It interacts with the ST_COLLEGE table to perform CRUD operations such as add, update, delete, and search. This class also provides utility methods like primary key generation, lookup by primary key, and lookup by college name.
Author:
Ram

  • Constructor Details

    • CollegeModel

      public CollegeModel()

  • Method Details

    • nextpk

      public Integer nextpk() throws DataBaseException
      Generates and returns the next available primary key for the ST_COLLEGE table. Queries the maximum existing id from ST_COLLEGE and returns it incremented by 1.
      Returns:
      the next available primary key as an Integer
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - if any database exception occurs while retrieving the max id

    • add

      public long add(CollegeBean bean) throws DuplicateException, ApplicationException
      Adds a new College record to the ST_COLLEGE table. Checks for a duplicate entry by college name before inserting. Generates the next primary key using nextpk() and inserts the CollegeBean data. Rolls back the transaction if an error occurs during insertion.
      Parameters:
      bean - the CollegeBean containing college details to be added
      Returns:
      the generated primary key of the newly added college record
      Throws:
      DuplicateException - if a record with the same name already exists
      ApplicationException - if any database exception occurs during add or rollback

    • update

      public void update(CollegeBean bean) throws ApplicationException, DuplicateException
      Updates an existing College record in the ST_COLLEGE table. Checks for a duplicate entry by college name before updating. Updates all fields of the record matched by the id in the given CollegeBean. Rolls back the transaction if an error occurs during the update.
      Parameters:
      bean - the CollegeBean containing updated college details
      Throws:
      DuplicateException - if a record with the same name already exists
      ApplicationException - if any database exception occurs during the update or rollback

    • delete

      public void delete(CollegeBean bean) throws Exception
      Deletes a College record from the ST_COLLEGE table by its id. Executes a delete query matching the id from the given CollegeBean and commits the transaction on success.
      Parameters:
      bean - the CollegeBean containing the id of the college to be deleted
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if any database exception occurs during the delete operation
      Exception

    • findBypk

      public CollegeBean findBypk(long pk) throws ApplicationException
      Finds and returns a College record from the ST_COLLEGE table by its primary key. Queries the ST_COLLEGE table using the given primary key value and maps the result to a CollegeBean.
      Parameters:
      pk - the primary key (id) of the college to retrieve
      Returns:
      CollegeBean if a matching record is found, null otherwise
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if any database exception occurs during the lookup

    • findByName

      public CollegeBean findByName(String name) throws ApplicationException
      Finds and returns a College record from the ST_COLLEGE table by its name. Queries the ST_COLLEGE table using an exact match on the college name and maps the result to a CollegeBean.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the college to search for
      Returns:
      CollegeBean if a matching record is found, null otherwise
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if any database exception occurs during the lookup

    • list

      public List<CollegeBean> list() throws ApplicationException
      Returns a list of all College records from the ST_COLLEGE table. Delegates to search(CollegeBean, int, int) with no filters and no pagination, returning the complete list of colleges.
      Returns:
      a List of all CollegeBean objects from ST_COLLEGE
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if any database exception occurs during the operation

    • search

      public List<CollegeBean> search(CollegeBean bean, int pageNo, int pageSize) throws ApplicationException
      Searches College records from the ST_COLLEGE table based on the provided filter criteria with pagination support. Dynamically builds a SQL query using non-null fields of the given CollegeBean. Supports filtering by id, name, address, state, city, and phone number. Results are paginated using pageNo and pageSize parameters.
      Parameters:
      bean - the CollegeBean containing filter criteria; fields with non-null or positive values are included in the WHERE clause
      pageNo - the page number to retrieve (1-based index)
      pageSize - the number of records per page; if 0 or less, pagination is skipped
      Returns:
      a List of CollegeBean objects matching the search criteria
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if any database exception occurs during the operation
